mapper.sql:
event.event_type = 'PREVIEW_CREATED'
AND ( event.preview_key LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR event.source_url LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR link.canonical_url LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR event.provider_id LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR event.requested_style LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR event.actual_style LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR event.ai_provider_names LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stats_event event LEFT JOIN stats_link link ON link.preview_key = event.preview_key WHERE

SELECT event.id, event.occurred_at, event.preview_key, COALESCE(event.source_url, '') AS source_url, COALESCE(link.canonical_url, '') AS canonical_url, event.provider_id, event.ai_requested, event.ai_succeeded, COALESCE(event.requested_style, '') AS requested_style, COALESCE(event.actual_style, '') AS actual_style, COALESCE(event.ai_provider_names, '') AS ai_provider_names, event.ai_duration_ms, event.crawl_duration_ms, event.duration_ms, event.cache_hit FROM stats_event event LEFT JOIN stats_link link ON link.preview_key = event.preview_key WHERE ORDER BY event.occurred_at DESC, event.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
